title: BIZDRIVE Job Spec
description: A per-clip work order produced by tools/template-manager.html. It tells an AI agent which template to use and which pipeline features to run. A feature with on:false means the agent SKIPS the step(s) that feature owns. See templates/_shared/docs/JOB_SPEC.md.

template.description: Template id, e.g. 04-fullscreen-vertical-karaoke. Must match a templates/NN-*/ directory.

video.description: Source video link or file path. May be empty — the user can supply it in chat instead.

topic.description: One-sentence topic / context of the clip. Feeds the editorial subagent slot.

durationTarget.description: Target final duration in seconds (a ceiling — the agent shrinks if content is shorter). null = follow content.

features.description: Keyed by feature id (see each template manifest's features[]). Every value has an 'on' boolean; option keys depend on the feature.

on.description: true = run this feature's step(s); false = skip them.

notes.description: Free-text adjustments the user wants — creative direction, things to emphasise or avoid.
